title: epilobium palustre var. sabulonense
intro: Epilobium palustre var. sabulonense, also known as the marsh willowherb or sea willowherb, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. The medicinal properties of Epilobium palustre var. sabulonense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of Epilobium palustre var. sabulonense typically involve drying the plant material to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
